text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Everyone who came to cheer for me is so happy
too... This is the best feeling ever!
choice_data_list: They're cheering like it's a festival out there!
They're cheering like it's a festival out there!

Let's take this energy with us into our next
training session.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Everyone who came to cheer for me is so happy
too... This is the best feeling ever!
choice_data_list: They're cheering like it's a festival out there!
They're cheering like it's a festival out there!

Let's take this energy with us into our next
training session.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! And it's not just the people at the venue
but everyone in my hometown too!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I just spoke to my dad on the phone earlier, and
he said he's going to raise a toast with everyone!
choice_data_list: Let's have a toast of our own too!
Let's have a toast of our own too!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Oh, right! I can't let my victory go to my head!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: It won't do to act like this in front of all my fans.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I have to work even harder to put smiles on
everyone's faces!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! This is just the beginning! I still have room
to grow and get stronger!
